CustomField.description: Formula to show an approval status or Approved, Pending Update, Pending, or Resubmission required. Based on checkboxes: First Approval Completed, Pending Update, Approval Submitted.
CustomField.formula:
IF( pro_Bank_Account_Closed__c = True, 'Bank Account Closed', IF( pro_First_Approval_Completed__c && ! pro_Pending_Update__c && ! pro_Approval_Submitted__c, 'Approved',
IF( pro_Pending_Update__c && pro_Approval_Submitted__c, 'Pending Update', IF(! pro_First_Approval_Completed__c && pro_Pending_Update__c, 'Pending', 'Resubmission Required' ))))
CustomField.label: Approval Status
